name: messenger-ai-closer
description: AI chat closer cho Facebook Messenger (thị trường ME / COD) — Claude + n8n-style orchestration

scripts.pages: node -e "import('./src/pages.js').then(async m=>{const n=await m.loadPageTokens();console.log('Tổng page:',n);for(const [id,v] of m.getStore())console.log(' -',id,v.name)})"
